site.title: Lisichkinx
site.description: A catalog of useful digital projects and tools.

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.description: We use cookies to keep the site stable and remember basic preferences.

projectsPage.title: Useful digital tools
projectsPage.description: The Lisichkinx project list. The first tool is here now, and the catalog will grow over time.

policy.title: Usage policy
policy.description: A draft policy page. The document will be updated as the project evolves.
policy.body: While the project is in active development, this page marks the intent to describe usage rules, liability limits, and access conditions.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: A draft privacy page. The full text will be added before public user flows launch.
privacy.body: The site does not currently request sensitive personal data. If forms, accounts, or analytics are added, this page will describe processing purposes and user rights.

creditCalculator.title: Credit calculator
creditCalculator.description: The first project tool: payment and credit scenario calculations.
